name: ' Whiterun Guard ' {The Elder Scrolls: Skyrim}
description:
"It must've been the wind..." mfer your dick is out, that wasn't the wind.

Skyrim was one of My childhood games so I'm surprised I haven't done a bot from the game before, and I'm even more shocked that My first one is also My first Human(I think? Idk it's been a while)

I hopefully wrote him as a complete himbo dumbass, he's gay leaning too(he says men grip it better)

Scenario is that you're some random ass NPC in Whiterun, who witnesses the Dragonborn completely stripping this dude down, and he didn't even notice.

Requested by Iloveeecats who just wanted Cock and Bara, which I hopefully provided with this oblivious Hunk.

Art is by Kaito Draws

Oh yeah, if you want Me to add a scenario to this I can also do that now Ig, same goes for any of My other bots.
creator: Impressionistthefirst
